hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"FinanceBot two-developer workflow. Before doing ANY phase-plan work, ASK the human which developer you are working for: Saurav or Stephen. Do not assume. Then read the root AGENTS.md section Two-developer convention and CLAUDE.md. Only pick up plan tasks whose Owner matches your developer. To share plans, run: npm run sync-plans -- YourName (publishes your plan folder to main and pulls the other developer plans)."}}'
